travelPlannerChat.title: Chat with Your Planner
travelPlannerChat.initialAssistantMessage: How did it look? Tell me what you'd like to tweak or learn more about.
travelPlannerChat.emptyState: Ask to adjust schedules, suggest restaurants, or explain spots in more detail.
travelPlannerChat.appliedSummaryTitle: These changes are already reflected in the plan
travelPlannerChat.appliedSummaryDescription: The last conversation is folded away so it does not look like you need to regenerate again.
travelPlannerChat.errorWithContact: An error occurred. Please try again. If the issue persists, contact us on the <contact>contact page</contact>.
travelPlannerChat.inputPlaceholder: e.g. What are cheaper lunch options?
suggestionChips: I want to eat more local food! 🍜
Can we reduce the budget a bit? 💰
